modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst in response to an email and that the person who created it speaks Spanish as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be no spelling errors and some contradictory ordering.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Unable to register for classes due to registration hold message.

full_description_text: A student is encountering a message indicating a hold on their account, preventing class registration. This issue arises while they attempt to use the self-service feature in Banner. The student is unsure why this hold exists and needs clarification on the matter.
short_description: Unable to register for classes due to registration hold message.
description: A student is encountering a message indicating a hold on their account, preventing class registration. This issue arises while they attempt to use the self-service feature in Banner. The student is unsure why this hold exists and needs clarification on the matter.
